fato_historico: 1139: Pope Innocent II confirms in the treaty of Mignano the investiture of the sons of Roger II of Sicily to their fiefs and abandons support for the barons opposed to Roger.
energia_do_dia: Today the universe encourages you to bridge gaps and solidify your personal foundations. Just as ancient treaties once brought peace between shifting powers, you may find that open communication helps you resolve lingering conflicts. It is a good time to negotiate with kindness and align your goals with those you hold dear. Embrace this grace.
frase_do_dia: Peace is built through the bridges we choose to construct today.
significado_numero: Symbolizes completion and the structural integrity of your inner circle.
conselho: Seek compromise in your relationships to create a lasting sense of belonging.
